pundit.name: Clint Dempsey
pundit.take:
"Mustard Boy's Bankin' on Oil Money Like It's Gonna Score Goals"

Alright, y'all, we got Devin's Spain squarin' up against Zach's Saudi Arabia. Spain's lookin' like a well-oiled machine, just about runnin' circles around their group rivals. Meanwhile, "Mustard Boy" Zach thinks that Saudi Arabia's petro-dollars gonna somehow translate to goals on the pitch. Hate to break it to ya, amigo, but you can't buy chemistry, and losin' to Spain's gonna feel like walkin' into a bar fight with a water pistol. I'm callin' it now — Spain's gonna light up the scoreboard like it's the Fourth of July, while Mustard Boy's sittin' there tryin' to figure out how he's tied with "The Noisemaker" Rafe at the top of the standings, despite backin' a team that's leakin' goals like an old bucket. Better luck next time, Zach. Meantime, I'm expectin' a Spanish fiesta in Atlanta.

pundit_takes.headline: Rafe Maintains Top Spot Despite Drafting Non-Qualifying Teams
pundit_takes.subtitle: The Noisemaker's strategy: ignorance is tactical bliss.

pundit_takes.headline: Mustard Boy and Ghost Pepper Set for Clash of Contrasts
pundit_takes.subtitle: Zach hopes for a spicy win with Saudi Arabia.

pundit_takes.headline: Bubba G's Egypt Predicted to Shine Against Kiwis in Vancouver
pundit_takes.subtitle: Gunner bets on sunburnt New Zealanders to drop points.

pundit_takes.headline: Gayden's Draft Strategy Finally Proves Ineffective Against Rafe
pundit_takes.subtitle: The Backpass Assassin faces reality: Rafe's beginner's luck endures.

rome_analytics_quotes: Rafe's chaos reigns supreme, leapfrogging three spots to take the lead.
Gunner's Tier-2 disaster in Senegal doesn't scream 'favorite' anymore.
Rafe's owning Devin 6-0; Ghost Pepper's more like scorched Frank.
Teenager Rafe schools Gunner, exposing the model's 'favorite' preference as a farce.
